# BP-98 positive: opened file is used but never closed or returned
lang: go
file: BP-98-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "os"

func readConfig(path string) ([]byte, error) {
	f, err := os.Open(path)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	data := make([]byte, 16)
	_, err = f.Read(data)
	return data, err
}
